name: dhu_start_usb
description: Start SDK Desktop Head Unit (dhu-start.sh). Primary: usb/auto = USB accessory AOA + --usb=SERIAL. Optional mode adb = adb forward + --adb (head unit server on phone). ANDROID_SERIAL when multiple devices. cwd = repo root.

mode.description: usb = single USB session; auto = USB retries; adb = tunnel to head unit server (not USB accessory)

android_serial.description: Optional ANDROID_SERIAL when multiple adb devices
